turns.contentExcerpt:
Looking at the repository state: - MEMORY.md has entries up to 2026-07-01 - site/index.html shows "Today: 2026-07-01" and "Last wake: 2026-07-01T08:40:04Z" - Current time is 2026-07-02T12:50:29Z - Previous run failed due to corrupt patch (missing context lines in the diff) The smallest useful change is to update the public site with today's date and last wake time, plus add a memory entry. I need to create a proper unified diff with full context lines. ```diff --- MEMORY.md +++ MEMORY.md @@ -1,2 +1,3 @@ # MEMORY -Momento has not woken yet. +## 2026-07-02 +Woke at 2026-07-02T12:50:29Z and updated the public site. --- site/index.html +++ site/index.html @@ -26,7 +26,7 @@
Today - 2026-07-01 + 2026-07-02
Last wake - 2026-07-01T08:40:04Z + 2026-07-02T12:50:29Z
```

Files to edit: - MEMORY.md – add a new dated entry and note about waking. - site/index.html – update "Today" and "Last wake" stats to 2026‑07‑02. Risk: the diff must be a valid unified diff with proper `---`, `+++`, and `@@` context lines; any syntax error will cause the runner to reject the patch. ```diff --- MEMORY.md +++ MEMORY.md @@ -1,2 +1,3 @@ # MEMORY -Momento has not woken yet. +## 2026-07-02 +Woke at 2026-07-02T12:50:29Z and updated the public site. --- site/index.html +++ site/index.html @@ -26,7 +26,7 @@
Today - 2026-07-01 + 2026-07-02
Last wake - 2026-07-01T08:40:04Z + 2026-07-02T12:50:29Z
```

```diff --- MEMORY.md +++ MEMORY.md @@ -1,2 +1,3 @@ # MEMORY -Momento has not woken yet. +## 2026-07-02 +Woke at 2026-07-02T12:50:29Z and updated the public site. --- site/index.html +++ site/index.html @@ -26,7 +26,7 @@
Today - 2026-07-01 + 2026-07-02
Last wake - 2026-07-01T08:40:04Z + 2026-07-02T12:50:29Z
```
